allow: Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "主页: %{http_code}\\n" http://127.0.0.1:8000/ && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "SQL编辑器: %{http_code}\\n" "http://127.0.0.1:8000/sql_editor/?ip=127.0.0.1&port=3306&account=test&passwd=test&db=ops_db")

Bash(curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8000/databases/tables/?ip=127.0.0.1&port=3306&account=test&passwd=test&db=ops_db" && echo && curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/databases/execute_sql/" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"ip":"127.0.0.1","port":3306,"account":"test","passwd":"test","db":"ops_db","sql":"SHOW TABLES"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/databases/execute_sql/" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"ip":"127.0.0.1","port":3306,"account":"test","passwd":"test","db":"ops_db","sql":"SHOW TABLES"}' | python3 -m json.tool)
Bash(mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES FROM jmms; SHOW TABLES FROM ops_db;" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -uroot -proot123 2>/dev/null <<'EOF'
-- dbs_admin：全库管理权限（DDL + DML，不含 SUPER/GRANT OPTION）
CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'dbs_admin'@'%'
    IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'Dbs@Admin2026';
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE,
      CREATE, DROP, INDEX, ALTER,
      CREATE VIEW, SHOW VIEW,
      CREATE ROUTINE, ALTER ROUTINE, EXECUTE,
      REFERENCES, TRIGGER, LOCK TABLES
ON *.* TO 'dbs_admin'@'%';

-- dbs_query：全库只读
CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'dbs_query'@'%'
    IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'Dbs@Query2026';
GRANT SELECT, SHOW VIEW ON *.* TO 'dbs_query'@'%';

FLUSH PRIVILEGES;

-- 验证
SELECT user, host,
       Select_priv, Insert_priv, Update_priv, Delete_priv,
       Create_priv, Drop_priv,   Alter_priv,  Super_priv
FROM mysql.user
WHERE user IN \('dbs_admin','dbs_query'\);
EOF)

Bash(mysql -uroot -proot123 -h127.0.0.1 -P4002 2>/dev/null <<'EOF'
USE hr_db;
INSERT INTO department \(name, manager, location, headcount, budget\) VALUES
\('云基础设施组', '马超',   '北京总部 B 座 4F',  15, 1000000.00\),
\('大数据平台组', '徐明',   '上海分部 4F',        18, 1300000.00\),
\('移动端开发组', '谢欣',   '深圳分部 2F',        22, 1400000.00\),
\('AI 算法组',    '胡博',   '北京总部 A 座 6F',   10, 1800000.00\),
\('客户成功部',   '江雨',   '上海分部 1F',        20, 1100000.00\),
\('法务合规组',   '沈楠',   '北京总部 C 座 3F',    5,  350000.00\),
\('品牌公关部',   '范婷',   '上海分部 2F',        12,  900000.00\),
\('解决方案部',   '唐磊',   '深圳分部 3F',        16, 1200000.00\),
\('战略规划部',   '石磊',   '北京总部 C 座 4F',    6,  600000.00\),
\('采购供应链部', '卢芳',   '北京总部 C 座 1F',    8,  700000.00\);
EOF)
Bash(mysql -uroot -proot123 -h127.0.0.1 -P4002 2>/dev/null -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS department_rows FROM hr_db.department;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -proot123 2>/dev/null -e "SHOW CREATE USER 'dbs_admin'@'%'; SHOW CREATE USER 'dbs_query'@'%';")

Bash(echo "等待容器启动..."; sleep 15
docker exec mysql-master mysql -uroot -pRoot@2026 -e "SELECT 1" 2>/dev/null && echo "master ready" || echo "master not ready"
docker exec mysql-slave  mysql -uroot -pRoot@2026 -e "SELECT 1" 2>/dev/null && echo "slave ready"  || echo "slave not ready")

Bash(echo "=== 主库数据 ==="
docker exec mysql-master mysql -uroot -pRoot@2026 -e "SELECT * FROM demo_cluster.orders;" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== 从库数据（同步结果）==="
docker exec mysql-slave mysql -uroot -pRoot@2026 -e "SELECT * FROM demo_cluster.orders;" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(/dev/null __NEW_LINE_ee140fbfcce9c4d9__ echo echo '=== 从库数据（同步结果）===' docker exec mysql-slave mysql -uroot -pRoot@2026 -e "SELECT * FROM demo_cluster.orders;")
Bash(python3 manage.py makemigrations databases && python3 manage.py migrate 2>&1)

Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u test -ptest ops_db 2>/dev/null <<'EOF'
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dbs_instances \(
  id         INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  remark     VARCHAR\(100\)  NOT NULL            COMMENT '备注名称',
  ip         VARCHAR\(128\)  NOT NULL            COMMENT 'IP 地址',
  port       SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL        COMMENT '端口',
  env        VARCHAR\(10\)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'test' COMMENT '环境\(prod/test/dev\)',
  created_by VARCHAR\(64\)   DEFAULT NULL        COMMENT '创建人',
  created_at DATETIME      NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
  UNIQUE KEY uk_ip_port \(ip, port\)
\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='DBS 平台实例注册表';
EOF
echo "exit=$?")

Bash(python3 -c "import MySQLdb; print\('mysqlclient OK'\)" 2>/dev/null || \\
python3 -c "import pymysql; print\('pymysql version:', pymysql.__version__\)")

SELECT ig.id, ig.name, ig.instances
FROM accounts_instancegroup ig
WHERE ig.name = 'prod-group';
")

SELECT name, instances FROM accounts_instancegroup WHERE name='prod-group';")
